rules.rule_text:
rule luxnet
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		maltype = "EXE"
		version = "0.1"
		reference = "Luxnet RAT - http://leak.sx/thread-254973"

	strings:
		$s1 = "XilluX" wide nocase
		$s2 = "Xanity" wide nocase
		$s3 = "PHP RAT Client" wide

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and 1 of ( $s* )
}
